gauge.name: North Oak Creek at Valparaiso

impacts.statement: Floodwaters begin to impact the shoulders of Highway 66.
Water begins to impact the bottom of the Highway 66 bridge.
Water begins to overtop the gravel road, South Oak Street, near the gage site.
The river is out of its banks.
At this level North Oak Creek is near bankfull.

hydronotes.statement: Stage may be affected by ice.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
